Technology

Tech & Tools

Deep dives into software, infrastructure, and the tools shaping how we work and think.

## What We Cover Technology moves fast. Our coverage moves deliberately. We focus on software and infrastructure, AI and machine learning beyond the hype, developer tools that actually improve how we build things, and the business models driving the platforms we use. --- ## Our Approach We're not a news aggregator. If a story appeared in ten other places yesterday, we'll only cover it if we have something genuinely new to add — a different angle, deeper context, or a contrarian read. We interview practitioners, not just executives. We read the documentation, not just the press releases. --- ## Recent Topics - Open source sustainability and the funding problem - The real cost of AI inference at scale - Why most developer tooling fails to ship - Infrastructure decisions you can't undo [Subscribe for updates →](/subscribe/)
